description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, sign, and deploy, and a global before_script that unsets http_proxy and https_proxy and prints all CI variables. In the build stage add two jobs, build_centos_7 and build_fedora_25, using the buildpkg/centos:7 and buildpkg/fedora:25 Docker images respectively, each running the command ci-build-pkg, tagging them with docker, and publishing the result/* directory as an artifact that expires after one day. Add a sign job in the sign stage that uses the buildpkg/debian:stretch image, runs ci-sign-pkg, depends on both build jobs, is tagged with docker, and stores result/* as a one‑day artifact. Finally add a pages job in the deploy stage that also uses buildpkg/debian:stretch, runs ci-pages-ppa, ci-pages-home, and ci-pages-tree, depends on the sign job, publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact, runs only on the master branch, and sets the environment named PPA with a URL http://${CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE}.gitlab.io/${CI_PROJECT_NAME}.
